JOI-001.name: default-red
JOI-001.description: First @pulseborder should appear within first 5 words or be a deliberate choice

JOI-002.name: green-touch-early
JOI-002.description: First @pulseborder green must appear within first 150 words

JOI-003.name: red-programming
JOI-003.description: @pulseborder red sections must contain at least 20 words

JOI-004.name: yellow-before-purple
JOI-004.description: @pulseborder yellow must immediately precede @pulseborder raspberry or purple

JOI-005.name: yellow-duration
JOI-005.description: Yellow phase must be 5-12 seconds at current WPM

JOI-006.name: purple-after-yellow
JOI-006.description: @pulseborder raspberry/purple must be preceded by @pulseborder yellow

JOI-007.name: recovery-green-extended
JOI-007.description: Recovery GREEN after edge→red→green sequence must be at least 10 seconds

JOI-009.name: edge-escalation
JOI-009.description: Edge (raspberry/purple) durations should trend upward (linear regression for 3+ edges; info-only for 2 edges)

JOI-010.name: edge-variation
JOI-010.description: Not all edges should be the same duration (variable reinforcement)

JOI-011.name: rapid-cycling-present
JOI-011.description: NSFW scripts should contain at least one rapid GREEN/RED cycling section

JOI-012.name: sfx-no-volume
JOI-012.description: @sfx directives must not contain volume parameters

JOI-013.name: min-edges
JOI-013.description: NSFW deny scripts should have at least 2 edge sequences

JOI-014.name: no-personal-refs
JOI-014.description: Scripts must not contain personal references or named characters

JOI-015.name: pause-after-snap-stop
JOI-015.description: @snap with word:Stop or word:Denied should be followed by recovery pause or border-off

JOI-016.name: opening-red-present
JOI-016.description: NSFW scripts should open with @pulseborder red before first green

JOI-018.name: border-off-before-end
JOI-018.description: Pulse border should be turned off before script ends

JOI-019.name: no-emdashes
JOI-019.description: Scripts must not contain em dashes or en dashes

JOI-020.name: cl-edge-escalation-within-cycle
JOI-020.description: Edge durations should escalate within each compliance cycle (sawtooth OK)

JOI-021.name: cl-loop-structure
JOI-021.description: Must have GREEN->RED/GREEN cycles->YELLOW->PURPLE->RED pattern at least twice

JOI-022.name: cl-variable-edge-gaps
JOI-022.description: Time between edges should be variable (CV > 0.2)

JOI-030.name: ct-rapid-cycling-section
JOI-030.description: Must have 4+ GREEN/RED transitions within 120 words

JOI-031.name: ct-regular-intervals
JOI-031.description: Rapid cycling phases should be regular (within 30% of section average)

JOI-032.name: ct-edge-regularity-ok
JOI-032.description: Edge timing may be regular (no variability requirement)

JOI-040.name: th-escalating-density
JOI-040.description: First third should have fewer color transitions than final third

JOI-041.name: th-override-expected
JOI-041.description: Rule violations with @lint-override JOI-XXX: trojan are expected, not errors
